name: Eidesvik Offshore ASA
summary: Eidesvik Offshore ASA operates as a shipping company. It operates through Seismic, Subsea/Offshore Wind, Platform Supply, and Other segments. The company delivers shipping services to customers who produce seismic data; subsea inspection, maintenance, repair, and construction services for subsea work in the oil industry; and shipping services the offshore oil industry. It operates 6 large supply and one smaller supply vessels; a fleet of 4 vessels related to seismic; and a fleet of 4 vessels related to subsea/wind. The company is headquartered in B√É¬∏mlo, Norway. Eidesvik Offshore ASA is a subsidiary of Eidesvik Invest AS.
